ddt:Target.Name: T4_EMM_DDT2000_SW5_V2_4
ddt:Target.Description: The DDT 2000 file is auto generated by Power tool. (DIESE/65690/Séction BCM/UET Modélisation)

Data.Name: C_B_ABSMalfunction_Inhibition
Data.Comment: [] Flag to indicate if ABSMalfunction value has to be inhibited or not (0=not inhibited; 1=forced to ABSMalfunction_Inhibited))

Data.Name: C_B_CyclingInhibition
Data.Comment: inhibition fonctionnalité compteur d'usure par cyclage

Data.Name: C_B_ETC_present
Data.Comment: [] Flag to indicate presence ETC (0=not present) [0;1;1]

Data.Name: C_B_IHMLowBatteryActiv
Data.Comment: Activation or not of IHM Low battery voltage

Data.Name: C_B_NewAltCartoUsed
Data.Comment: [-] boolean which index the new alternator cartography or not [0;1;1]

Data.Name: C_B_RearLeft_Door
Data.Comment: [b] =0 Rear Left Door state not to be taken into account to inhibit technical auto start [0;1;1]

Data.Name: C_B_RearRight_Door
Data.Comment: [b] =0 Rear Right Door state not to be taken into account to inhibit technical auto start [0;1;1]

Data.Name: C_B_ReflexStart
Data.Comment: [] Flag to indicate if the reflex strat is present or not (0=not present) [0;1;1]

Data.Name: C_B_StopAutoStateDisplayRequest
Data.Comment: [boolean] To inhib StopAutoStateDisplayRequest if not need: 0 = inhibited, 1 = not inhibited

Data.Name: C_B_Trunk_Door
Data.Comment: [b] =0 Trunk Door state not to be taken into account to inhibit technical auto start [0;1;1]

Data.Name: C_C_alt_LimpHome
Data.Comment: [N.m] C_alt value when a defaut is confirmed [0;1;20]

Data.Name: C_C_alt_max_LimpHome
Data.Comment: [N.m] C_alt_max value when a defaut is confirmed [0;1;40]

Data.Name: C_D_DistStopAuto_min
Data.Comment: [m] Distance covered since the last automatic restarting [0;0.1;25.5]

Data.Name: C_dU_RampDetect_max
Data.Comment: [V/s] Delta de Tension au dessus duquel Ramp detected devient actif [0;0.5;10]

Data.Name: C_dU_RampDetect_min
Data.Comment: [V/s] Delta de Tension en dessous duquel Ramp detected devient actif [-10;0.5;0]

Data.Name: C_I_Aux_limp
Data.Comment: [A] Invalid value for I consumed by aux [0;1;255]

Data.Name: C_K_Alt04_DATA2
Data.Comment: [-] DATA2 for alternator BOSCH M8E 150 A [0;1;255]

Data.Name: C_K_Alt06_DATA2
Data.Comment: [-] DATA2 for alternator BOSCH M6E 120 A [0;1;255]

Data.Name: C_K_Alt07_DATA2
Data.Comment: [-] DATA2 for alternator VALEO TG15 150 A [0;1;255]

Data.Name: C_K_Alt08_DATA2
Data.Comment: [-] DATA2 for alternator VALEO FG15t 150 A (supplier '001' alternator '00010') [0;1;255]

Data.Name: C_K_AltCharUsedWhenInvalid
Data.Comment: [-] Value of BOSCH LIE8 in AlternatorNumber [0;1;15]

Data.Name: C_K_DriverDoorInactiveCounterMaxValue_TP
Data.Comment: [-] Max value of driver door inactive counter[0;1;255]

Data.Name: C_K_DriverDoorInactiveThreshold_TP
Data.Comment: [-] threshold to detect coherence of driver door state [0;1;15]

Data.Name: C_K_EngineFanSpeedRequestESMMin
Data.Comment: [-] Minimum level of GMV for need of high battery voltage [0;1;3]

Data.Name: C_K_JaugeChargedMotorOFF
Data.Comment: [-] Minimum percent Jauge to declare the presence of a charger Motor On [0;1;100]

Data.Name: C_K_JaugeChargedMotorON
Data.Comment: [-] Minimum percent Jauge to declare the Gauge Ok to suppress the battery Lamp [0;1;100]

Data.Name: C_K_JaugeVTInit
Data.Comment: [%] Gauge init value equal to maximum battery voltage [0:1:100]

Data.Name: C_K_Mission
Data.Comment: [-] Number of missions to confirm Oil pressure switch failure [0:1:50]

Data.Name: C_K_NBR_BRK_1
Data.Comment: [-] Number of brakes before triggering pressostat in stop phase [0;1;63]

Data.Name: C_K_NotOldBatt_Check
Data.Comment: [-] Code for not worn batt checking in progress [0:1:3]

Data.Name: C_K_OldBatt_Check
Data.Comment: [-] Code for worn batt checking in progress [0:1:3]

Data.Name: C_K_TechnicalWUChargerDetect_max
Data.Comment: [-] Number of charger presence during parking (every 8h) to declare that the battery is energy full with ESM and S&S [0:1:5]

Data.Name: C_K_TechnicalWUChargerDetect_min
Data.Comment: [-] Number of charger presence during parking (every 2h) to declare that the battery is energy full without ESM and S&S [0:1:5]

Data.Name: C_K_TimeOut_Check
Data.Comment: [-] Code for check in Time Out [0:1:3]

Data.Name: C_K_U_Ref
Data.Comment: [V] reference voltage of the new alternator cartography [12;0.5;16]

Data.Name: C_N_eng_ForceRamp
Data.Comment: [RPM] Engine RPM below which ramp is forced to the max [0;10;1000]

Data.Name: C_N_eng_InhibitRamp_max
Data.Comment: [RPM] Engine RPM above which ramp is inhibited [1000;10;3000]

Data.Name: C_P_alt_InstantPower_limp

Data.Comment: Low linmit km/h of the vehicule [0:1:255]

Data.Comment: [km/h] Max threshold speed to authorize automatic stop [0;1;15]

Data.Name: C_S_VehSpeedStopAuto_min
Data.Comment: [km/h] Min threshold speed to authorize automatic start [0;1;30]

Data.Name: C_SASF

Data.Comment: [ms] Validation time of the button not supported state [0;10;2550]

Data.Name: C_T_BtnON_valid
Data.Comment: [ms] Validation time of the button supported state [0;10;2550]

Data.Name: C_Temp_batt_min

Data.Comment: [°C] Low Thresold Temperature min allowed for blower performance [-40;1;60]

Data.Comment: [°C] High Thresold Temperature max allowed by cooling fan [-40;1;60]

Data.Comment: [°C] Low Thresold Temperature max allowed by cooling fan [-40;1;60]

Data.Name: C_TM_BreakDepressureFailure_starting
Data.Comment: [s] Delay added between the detection of low voltage measurement in not automatic starting for brake depressure [0;0.1;25.5]

Data.Name: C_TM_CustomerPresenceConfirmation
Data.Comment: [s] Time to consider that the customer is in the car and begun to take current from battery [0:1:255]

Data.Name: C_TM_DriverSeatFailure
Data.Comment: [s] Time out of confirmation of the driver seat sensor [0;0.01;2.5]

Data.Name: C_TM_DriverSeatFailure_starting
Data.Comment: [s] Delay added between the detection of low voltage measurement in not automatic starting for driver seat[0;0.1;25.5]

Data.Name: C_TM_DriverSeatToNotSeat_Delay
Data.Comment: [s] Delay added between the detection of the driver seat to not seat [0;0.05;5]

Data.Name: C_TM_LEDSCGConf
Data.Comment: [s] Time out to confirm a SCG failure of the LED [0;0.01;1]

Data.Name: C_TM_LEDStab
Data.Comment: [s] Time out before voltage reading since LED is ON to ensure stabilization [0;0.01;1]

Data.Name: C_TM_LimitTime_CustomerConf
Data.Comment: [s] Time out for confirmation of Presence customer [0;0.01;2.5]

Data.Name: C_TM_LoopTime

Data.Name: C_TM_MastervacFailure
Data.Comment: [s] Time out of confirmation of the mastervac [0;0.01;2.5]

Data.Name: C_TM_MinTimeEngStopped
Data.Comment: [s] Minimal time during engine could be stopped [0;1;30]

Data.Name: C_TM_PmaxNul

Data.Name: C_TM_Stop_req

Data.Name: C_TM_TimeMaxOfLowBattVoltageDisplay

Data.Name: PaddingDatas
Data.Comment: Spaces in Ascii, added to complete the frame request $2184, traceability.

Data.Name: S_ParkingTime_init
Data.Comment:
You should perform a flush of the below EEM parameters in E2PROM in the following event : after an ignition transition (ON -> OFF)
The ignition condition should be V_B_Ignition_relay_cmd

Data.Name: V_K_JaugeVT_mem
Data.Comment:
You should perform a flush of the below EEM parameters in E2PROM in the following event : after an ignition transition (ON -> OFF) when USM goes to sleep
The ignition condition should be V_B_Ignition_relay_cmd

Data.Name: V_Pct_SOCCurrent_est
Data.Comment:
You should perform a flush of the below EEM parameters in E2PROM in the following event : after an ignition transition (ON -> OFF) when USM goes to sleep
The ignition condition should be V_B_Ignition_relay_cmd

Data.Name: V_Temp_eq_Cond_mem
Data.Comment: [°C] Fisrt wake time of the vehicule life [-40:1:215]

Data.Name: V_Temp_Mot_mem
Data.Comment: [°C] Fisrt wake time of the vehicule life [-40:1:215]
